## Description

Brief description of the change.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Language support
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](../blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes with no errors
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes with no failures
- [ ] I have added or updated tests to cover my changes
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`) if needed
- [ ] I have verified the VSIX package builds correctly (`pnpm run vscode:prepublish`)
